install_actions: write client config sync systemd service unit mode 0644
write client config sync systemd timer unit mode 0644
config_sync_plan.sync_service_content:
[Unit]
Description=x0tta6bl4 first-party VPN client config sync
After=network-online.target
Wants=network-online.target

[Service]
Type=oneshot
WorkingDirectory=/opt/x0tta-firstparty-vpn-client
Environment=PYTHONUNBUFFERED=1
Environment=PYTHONPATH=/opt/x0tta-firstparty-vpn-client
ExecStart=/usr/bin/python3 /opt/x0tta-firstparty-vpn-client/x0vpn_node.py client-config-sync --config /etc/x0tta-firstparty-vpn-client/client.json --update-config --timeout 3.0 --restart-service --service-name x0tta-firstparty-vpn-client.service --allow-os-mutation
config_sync_plan.timer_content:
[Unit]
Description=x0tta6bl4 first-party VPN client config sync timer

[Timer]
OnBootSec=300s
OnUnitActiveSec=300s
Unit=x0tta-firstparty-vpn-client-config-sync.service
AccuracySec=30s
Persistent=true

[Install]
WantedBy=timers.target

install_actions: write client config sync systemd service unit mode 0644
write client config sync systemd timer unit mode 0644
unit_content:
[Unit]
Description=x0tta6bl4 first-party VPN client
After=network-online.target
Wants=network-online.target

[Service]
Type=simple
WorkingDirectory=/opt/x0tta-firstparty-vpn-client
Environment=PYTHONUNBUFFERED=1
Environment=PYTHONPATH=/opt/x0tta-firstparty-vpn-client
ExecStart=/usr/bin/python3 /opt/x0tta-firstparty-vpn-client/x0vpn_node.py client-tun --config /etc/x0tta-firstparty-vpn-client/client.json --allow-os-mutation --apply-client-policy --enable-kill-switch
ExecStopPost=-/usr/bin/python3 /opt/x0tta-firstparty-vpn-client/x0vpn_node.py client-policy-rollback --config /etc/x0tta-firstparty-vpn-client/client.json --allow-os-mutation --enable-kill-switch
Restart=always
RestartSec=3
KillSignal=SIGTERM
TimeoutStopSec=15

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
